title: PR Security/Bugs Backstop Verdict
description: On-disk artifact written ONLY by `run-review-loop.sh --write-backstop-verdict`. The gate (pre-pr-gate.sh) and `--write-pr-marker` require a fresh PASS instance of this artifact whose diff_hash matches the current base...HEAD before a PR marker is honored. The writer re-derives `diff_hash` and `ts` itself; the caller never supplies them.

status.description: Recomputed by the writer from issues: FAIL if any issue is severity high, else PASS. An explicit caller FAIL is never overridden to PASS.

model.description: Model that produced the backstop review (e.g. opus).

diff_hash.description: sha256 of `git diff <merge-base>...HEAD` (bare; deterministic flags -c color.ui=never -c diff.external= -c core.quotePath=false are deferred per ADR 0006), re-derived by the writer. 64 lowercase hex chars.

ts.description: Integer epoch seconds (date +%s) at write time, set by the writer. Freshness = now-ts <= LITMUS_PR_BACKSTOP_MAX_AGE.
